hero.alt: A beautiful portrait of a Manta Ray in the wild
hero.caption: The Manta Ray is a highly adapted species with unique behaviors.

habitat.alt: A Manta Ray navigating its natural environment
habitat.caption: They make their home in diverse habitats where they can find shelter and thrive.

diet.alt: A Manta Ray finding or consuming food
diet.caption: Finding food is a major part of the daily routine for a Manta Ray.

baby.alt: A young or baby Manta Ray showing early development
baby.caption: Baby Manta Rays must learn to survive and adapt from a young age.

family.alt: A group of Manta Rays interacting with each other
family.caption: While often solitary, some Manta Rays interact with others of their species.

range.alt: A giant oceanic manta ray cruising underwater
range.caption: Giant oceanic manta rays travel long distances across deep ocean waters.

size.alt: A massive manta ray feeding, showing its large size relative to surrounding fish
size.caption: Manta rays are the largest rays in the world, with wingspans reaching up to 23 feet.

closeup.alt: A detailed close-up showing the physical features of a Manta Ray
closeup.caption: A close-up view reveals the intricate details of a Manta Ray's body.

fun-fact.fileTitle: File:Stamp of Indonesia - 1997 - Colnect 254167 - Giant Oceanic Manta Ray Manta birostris Brain Coral.jpeg
fun-fact.alt: A Manta Ray showing a unique behavior or adaptation
fun-fact.caption: Did you know that the Manta Ray has amazing features that help it survive?
